question: Comment assurer la haute disponibilite avec multi-instance et health checks ?

principles: Reverse proxy + load balancer devant les replicas
Health checks pour detecter les instances defaillantes
Replicas Docker Compose avec healthcheck integre

java-spring-boot.recommendation: Docker Compose deploy.replicas=2 + healthcheck via Spring Boot Actuator /actuator/health. Configurer management.endpoint.health.show-details=when_authorized et activer les health indicators (db, redis). Caddy en reverse proxy + TLS. PostgreSQL streaming replication.
sources: Docker Compose deploy docs — replicas, healthcheck (niv. 3)
Spring Boot Actuator docs — health endpoint (niv. 3)
Google SRE Book ch.3 — embracing risk (niv. 5)

typescript-nestjs.recommendation: Docker Compose deploy.replicas=2 + healthcheck via endpoint /health personnalise ou @nestjs/terminus. Caddy en reverse proxy. PostgreSQL streaming replication.
sources: Google SRE Book ch.3 — embracing risk (niv. 5)

python-django.recommendation: Docker Compose deploy.replicas=2 + healthcheck via endpoint /health personnalise ou django-health-check. Gunicorn workers multiples. Caddy en reverse proxy. PostgreSQL streaming replication.
sources: Google SRE Book ch.3 — embracing risk (niv. 5)
